title: Volume 1, Issue 1 (January–March 2026)
theme: Multidisciplinary Perspectives on Legal, Social and Agricultural Transformation
description: The inaugural issue of IJMEER presents foundational research across law, public health, agriculture, education, and economics, featuring case studies from across India (Uttar Pradesh, Kerala, Punjab, Maharashtra, and Tamil Nadu).

articles.title: Implementation of Three New Criminal Laws in India: A Study of Police Preparedness in Uttar Pradesh
Mental Health Awareness Among College Students in Kerala Post-COVID: Prevalence, Perceptions, and Help-Seeking Behaviour
Farmers' Adoption of Sustainable Agricultural Practices in Punjab: Barriers, Motivators, and Policy Implications
Digital Literacy and Access to Online Education in Rural Maharashtra: A Study of Learner Experiences and Infrastructural Gaps
Impact of MSME Schemes on Women Entrepreneurs in Tamil Nadu: Evidence from Madurai and Tirunelveli Districts
